what_stands_out: The dual nature of the firm's intensity, where the same environment is described as both an inspiring bootcamp and a source of significant exhaustion.
The contrast between high-tier financial rewards and the personal cost of maintaining the required pace of work.
The reliance on individual proactivity to navigate career growth and avoid unfavorable project assignments.
The strong emphasis on an apprenticeship model that fosters collaboration despite the competitive nature of the industry.
